_meta.resume_note: The complete official 2025-2026 Associate Degrees and Associate Degrees for Transfer indexes contain no general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS.

none_found_sources.locator: Printed catalog pages 213-214 and 327, complete Associate Degrees and Associate Degrees for Transfer indexes; no Economics award is listed

notes: Mt. SAC publishes Business: Economics coursework, but its complete 2025-2026 local and transfer associate-degree indexes do not publish an Economics-titled award. General Business and other business awards are adjacent awards and are outside this pass.
